title: Stisseria stellaris
taxonomy: Stisseria stellaris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae, which is now often included in the family Apocynaceae. It is a type of milkweed vine native to southern Africa. This plant is further classified within the genus Stisseria, which includes several other species of flowering plants. The classification of Stisseria stellaris is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the Apocynaceae family. The classification of this plant helps in understanding its evolutionary history and its relationships with other organisms.
